title: 12th Angel Rei Lilith
wikitext:
[]: 12th Angel, Rei, Lilith             Quote Post by trq » Sat May 11, 2013 1:43 pm Hello. Well, I don't know if it was already discussed, but there's few things i noticed. First, some issues that may be involved here: 1) Where's Rei 2 2) What is 12th Angel and how it got into Mk6 3) Why Lilith's head looks like Rei\Yui ======= So, in 2.0 Rei was devoured by Zeruel and somehow ended up in its core: Note, that Rei also says something like "now this is the only place I can live in". Is she talking about core? Now, we see giant naked red Rei, that red substance definitely reminds angels'\evas' core material. Giant red Rei merges with Eva-01 core. Now, in Q we can see 12th Angel, which was sealed in Mark 6 and known to be purely core thing, transforms into giant Rei head. Again, big red Rei made of core. Ok, what does it all mean? Could it be that: 1) Red core-ish Rei (or part of her) was transplanted into Mk.6 (is this what Kaworu was referring when he said Mk.6 was turned into autonomous state?) 2) Then somehow became 12th Angel, or was merged with\infected by 12th Angel and 3) Made contact with Lilith and this is how Rei image ended up in Lilith. Or somehow she just broke free from Unit-01 and became an angel. Or 12th was a different thing, but it took control over Mk.6, which had core Rei as part of control system, as said above. Also, notice how all those FOI-evas are red. Fuyutsuki's word about Rei being inside Eva 01 can be explained like that: 1) He's lying 2) Rei was split into two parts or something 3) He's talking about her soul, and red corelike body was used in some different way Just wanted to share my thoughts.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] #th Angel, Rei, Lilith             Quote Post by Xiel » Sat May 11, 2013 7:01 pm trq wrote: 2) Rei was split into two parts or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun May 12, 2013 12:59 am Or it could be Rei 3 who fused with Lilith or the 12th Angel to make the giant Rei heads. That brings up an interesting question- since the 12th Angel never actually fused with Lilith, how come both the 12th and Lilith have taken Rei's form? Maybe there was more than one Rei running around (like in the ANIMA spinoff) and one got sucked into the 12th while the other fused with Lilith. And after all the mess settled down, ReiQ was produced. I don't think Rei I had anything to do with this, though, since the location of her soul was never specified. If you assume it's like NGE and her soul was in Eva-00, well, Eva-00 was eaten by Zeruel and its core was absorbed into Eva-01. Eva-00 does got beserk once in 1.0, though the reason for that is ambiguous.

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Sun May 12, 2013 1:10 am Correct me if I'm wrong, but the Reis in Anima are remote controlled by teh Rei. They are like extensions of her. Shinoyami65 wrote: I don't think Rei I had anything to do with this, though, since the location of her soul was never specified. If you assume it's like NGE and her soul was in Eva-00, well, Eva-00 was eaten by Zeruel and its core was absorbed into Eva-01.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 12, 2013 6:16 am Shinoyami65 wrote: since the 12th Angel never actually fused with Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun May 12, 2013 6:32 am The 12th Angel must have merged with the lower half of Lilith anyway when it was connected to it. Maybe this is what triggered actual Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Sun May 12, 2013 7:42 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The 12th Angel must have merged with the lower half of Lilith anyway when it was connected to it. Maybe this is what triggered actual Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun May 12, 2013 8:31 am Reichu wrote: Are you sure about that? It seemed to be interacting with Lilith's liquid remains.

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Fri May 31, 2013 6:32 pm I'm the only one to think that the 12th Angel is only the metallic lint? I think Rei face was just a reaction to Lilith and the fact that he was only turned a core due to the fact that he was doing what all the angels wanted (returning to Adam, in case, EVA13) ie, all the angels who met Adam could become a core also (this would be a characteristic common to all the angels) Off: maybe the angel merged with Mark06 because he discovered that the giant in the underground was Lilith and not Adam?

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri May 31, 2013 7:25 pm This and Gendo's utter lack of concern regarding Unit 01 have been bugging me for quite a while. I've got a crackpot theory: We have the Lilith/Yui (I'm assuming it's Yui based on the volume of hair) and RedRei/12th Angel fetus thing occurring in short order. Now, to my knowledge, the only times the Angels take on the shape of someone else, even in the movie editions, is when they're actually in contact with that person, i.e. ZeruRei, Bardiel/Asuka. We even had that suspiciously similar Giant Red Rei from Zeruel. But there's no Yui or Rei in that mix, just Lilith, 12 and Eva mk 6. And if Lilith has Yui's head and not Rei's, why would she take that shape when Yui's in Eva 01? What little we see of Unit 01 in 3.0 shows that it's been rearmored, is no longer speared (implied to have been removed some time in the past; Kaworu thinks Cassius is in Doma, remember), and generally no longer in Impact Mode. In 3.0, they're very careful not to show it above the chest, and when we last saw it in 2.22, it had two cores. All of this plus the NeoNerv logo on the Tesseract suggests it was in Nerv's possession for quite some time before being shot into space. I'm wondering if they somehow extracted Shinji from Unit 01's core or filtered him into the secondary core and removed the one containing Yui and Rei completely. That would explain some of Eva 01's odd behavior in 3.0: It awakens when Asuka calls for Shinji and uses a power it only had during Shinji's freakout, but then it just doesn't work when Wille tries that deep sync test on him later. But Eva 13 accepted Shinji just fine, so the problem seems to be the Eva, not him. Maybe it was just running off Shinji himself. Once Wille filtered him out, there would be nothing in the Eva to synchronize with, leaving it braindead, essentially. Wille had no desire to use it as anything other than a battery, so they never tested it with their pilots. It's farfetched, but Gendo could have swapped Unit 01's core with Mk 06's when the latter was being refitted as an autonomous Unit, hence the appearance of Rei and/or Yui in that mess Lilith became. Unit 01's core holds both of them, and Mk 06 is really the only common element between the two Angels. Doing that would fit Gendo's desire to remove Kaworu and his Eva from Seele's hands. He could keep Waifu and Waifu Jr. safe in Lilith's neck in Dogma, still go through with the pretense of doing something about Unit 01, get rid of Seele's boy and his little robot, and further the Plan. This assumes the 12th Angel absorbed Eva 06's body like Zeruel did Unit 00's. Rei and Yui go into the huge core Angel. Zeruel established they could probably be recovered from this. And where did the 12th Angel go? Into the powerful, suspiciously Unit 01 looking Eva 13, which is still in Gendo's control if he bothers to recover it. Edit: fixed some typos

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 31, 2013 8:45 pm Lilith's head is specified in the script as being a "Rei" head. Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri May 31, 2013 9:01 pm Reichu wrote: Lilith's head is specified in the script as being a "Rei" head. Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri May 31, 2013 9:26 pm Reichu wrote: Lilith's head is specified in the script as being a "Rei" head. Sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 31, 2013 10:08 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: But Gendo does refer to the Head as "Yui".

[]:             Quote Post by Dancougar82 » Wed Aug 13, 2014 11:06 pm Another thing that one must remember when speculating about the characters is that aside from what has been revealed in the movies thus far, there is no indication that anything that happened to the TV versions of them happened with the movie versions of them. So until otherwise revealed, one cannot say that there was a Rei 1 who was murdered in the movie chronology. Because the first two movies retcon the majority of what happened in the TV series. And from 3.33 on, events are no longer anything like what happened before. So unless in the last movie they decide to fill in the huge gap in Rei's backstory, it may never be answered. This especially true when one considers how in one movie they have to wrap it all up adequately. Individual plot elements would ultimately have only so much on screen time to be resolved unless they are all inextricably tied together. --Dancougar82

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Thu Aug 14, 2014 1:48 am Man, does FINAL have a lot to explain.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Aug 14, 2014 3:49 am Q, bringing Anno's "people have to figure things out themselves and mustn't wait to be fed answers" to whole new levels. But we know, in reality he just wants to make a shitload of money from exclusive interviews. But that's why I kinda like the loop-theory. So we can take everything from NGE in account, but don't need to. I just hope it will stay heavily alluded and not stated.

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Thu Aug 14, 2014 4:55 am I'll be honest. At times it feels like Anno is just throwing whatever he can at the story and see what makes us go crazy. Does he even plan on giving some sort of justification and meaning behind all the things he's doing? Or is this him just trolling the fanbase?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 15, 2014 2:36 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The 12th Angel must have merged with the lower half of Lilith anyway when it was connected to it. Maybe this is what triggered actual Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 15, 2014 2:51 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Yui no longer being in Eva-01 would explain Shinji's mysterious 0% synch rate, though Fuyutsuki's later comment about here being "Eva-01's control system" would be put in doubt. Still, it's interesting to really consider where breaking accepted rules can take us. What if Rei isn't in Lilith, and never was. What if Rei is the 12th angel, or in Mark.06's core?

What little we see of Unit 01 in 3.0 shows that it's been rearmored, is no longer speared (implied to have been removed some time in the past; Kaworu thinks Cassius is in Doma, remember), and generally no longer in Impact Mode. In 3.0, they're very careful not to show it above the chest, and when we last saw it in 2.22, it had two cores. All of this plus the NeoNerv logo on the Tesseract suggests it was in Nerv's possession for quite some time before being shot into space. I'm wondering if they somehow extracted Shinji from Unit 01's core or filtered him into the secondary core and removed the one containing Yui and Rei completely. But Eva 13 accepted Shinji just fine, so the problem seems to be the Eva, not him. Maybe it was just running off Shinji himself. Once Wille filtered him out, there would be nothing in the Eva to synchronize with, leaving it braindead, essentially. Wille had no desire to use it as anything other than a battery, so they never tested it with their pilots. It's farfetched, but Gendo could have swapped Unit 01's core with Mk 06's when the latter was being refitted as an autonomous Unit, hence the appearance of Rei and/or Yui in that mess Lilith became.
